title: Prepared or preserved citrus fruits imported from China (anti-dumping duty 2441)
body: "Anti-dumping duty is an import duty charged in addition to normal Customs Duty and is applied in the UK and across the whole EU.  It’s designed to allow the UK and EU to take action against goods that are sold at less than their normal value – that being defined as the price for ‘like goods’ sold in the exporter’s home market. "

taxons.title: Customs declarations, duties and tariffs (import and export)
